paper_title: Rho GTPase ROP1 Interactome Analysis Reveals Novel ROP1-Associated Pathways for Pollen Tube Polar Growth in Arabidopsis

methods.description: This method involves the functional classification of ROP1-associated proteins using Gene Ontology (GO) analysis to understand their roles in biological processes, cellular components, and molecular functions. The analysis helps identify significant processes and pathways involving ROP1-associated proteins, providing insights into their roles in pollen tube growth and other cellular functions.

steps.description: ROP1-associated proteins were subjected to functional classification by GO analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GO analysis on ROP1-associated proteins

steps.description: The analysis revealed significant processes of ROP1-associated proteins, including reproductive processes, pollen tube germination and growth, cell-wall modification, cytoskeleton organization, protein transport, and small GTPase-mediated signaling transduction.
steps.searchable_summary: identify significant biological processes from GO analysis

steps.description: The top enriched GO term for ROP1-binding proteins is translation.
steps.searchable_summary: determine top enriched GO term for ROP1-binding proteins

steps.description: Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) analysis was performed to identify potential pathways involved.
steps.searchable_summary: perform KEGG analysis on ROP1-associated proteins

methods.method_name: Protein Network Analysis of ROP1-Associated Proteins
methods.description: This method involves generating a putative protein-protein interaction network among ROP1-associated proteins to explore their interactions and identify clusters of proteins involved in various biological processes.

steps.description: A putative protein-protein interactive network was generated among 130 members, including five BP classifications.
steps.searchable_summary: generate protein-protein interaction network for ROP1-associated proteins

steps.description: The network showed that 78% of elements were part of complex interactions, concentrated in five clusters.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze protein interaction network for complex interactions

steps.description: The ROP1 cluster can be formed between ROP1 and its interactors such as RIC family members, RhoGAP REN1, RhoGDI, RhoGEF9, PIPK kinases, and receptor kinase PRK3.
steps.searchable_summary: identify ROP1 cluster and its interactors

steps.description: The ROP1 cluster showed links with vesicular trafficking and cell wall modification.
steps.searchable_summary: identify links between ROP1 cluster and biological processes
